content.problemStatement:
Chef has a sequence AAA of NNN integers such that ‚à£Ai‚à£‚â§1|A_i| \leq 1‚à£Ai‚Äã‚à£‚â§1.

For each xxx such that ‚àíN‚â§x‚â§N-N \leq x \leq N‚àíN‚â§x‚â§N, find the number of non-empty subsequences of AAA whose sum of elements is xxx. Since that answer may be too large, print this modulo 163,577,857163,577,857163,577,857.

###Input:


The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äã,A2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äã.
###Output:
Output 2N+12N+12N+1 space-separated integers C0,C1‚Ä¶C2‚àóNC_0, C_1 \ldots C_{2*N}C0‚Äã,C1‚Äã‚Ä¶C2‚àóN‚Äã, where CiC_iCi‚Äã denotes the number of non-empty subsequences with sum (i‚àíN)(i-N)(i‚àíN), modulo 163,577,857163,577,857163,577,857.

###Constraints:


1‚â§T‚â§1051 \le T \le 10^51‚â§T‚â§105
1‚â§N‚â§1051 \le N \le 10^51‚â§N‚â§105
‚à£Ai‚à£‚â§1|A_i| \le 1‚à£Ai‚Äã‚à£‚â§1 for each valid iii
It's guaranteed that the total length of the arrays in one test file doesn't exceed 2‚àó1062*10^62‚àó106
###Sample Input:

`2
2
1 0
3
-1 1 -1
`###Sample Output:

`0 0 1 2 0
0 1 3 2 1 0 0
`Explanation:In the first test case, the non-empty subsequences with sum 000 are {0}\{0\}{0} while the subsequences with sum 111 are {1}\{1\}{1} and {1,0}\{1,0\}{1,0}.
